name: rig
description: rig — a LEGO-style harness composer. Compose bricks (facets/patterns/steps/recipes) at invocation time into a task-specific agent harness. Domain-agnostic engine: dev-flow orchestration (review, implement, PR), pluggable packs — sales deal-review, a conversational mode (rig:talk), a goal-driven loop (rig:goal), and existing-PR review (rig:pr) — plus a --validate doctor for brick integrity. Claude Code native; no heavy DSL engine.
